sentences.target: Ich gehe raus, aber es regnet.

translations.de: Ich gehe raus, aber es regnet.
translations.en: I’m going outside, but it’s raining.
translations.es: Voy a salir, pero está lloviendo.
translations.vi: Tôi ra ngoài, nhưng trời đang mưa.
translations.nl: Ik ga naar buiten, maar het regent.
translations.hi: मैं बाहर जा रहा हूँ, लेकिन बारिश हो रही है।
translations.nb: Jeg går ut, men det regner.
translations.id: Aku mau keluar, tapi sedang hujan.
translations.sv: Jag går ut, men det regnar.
translations.da: Jeg går ud, men det regner.
translations.ja: 外に出ますが、雨が降っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; part of the separable verb with particle 'raus'.
Separable verb particle (Verbzusatz) forming 'rausgehen'; placed after the finite verb to indicate outward movement.
Coordinating conjunction introducing a contrastive clause.
Impersonal pronoun functioning as dummy subject in a weather expression.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive weather verb.

sentences.target: Er hat Zeit, aber er kommt nicht.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ hat tsaɪ̯t, ˈaːbɐ eːɐ̯ kɔmt nɪçt/

translations.de: Er hat Zeit, aber er kommt nicht.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ hat tsaɪ̯t, ˈaːbɐ eːɐ̯ kɔmt nɪçt/
translations.en: He has time, but he’s not coming.
translations.es: Él tiene tiempo, pero no viene.
translations.fr: Il a le temps, mais il ne vient pas.
translations.ru: У него есть время, но он не придёт.
translations.pt: Ele tem tempo, mas não vem.
translations.he: יש לו זמן, אבל הוא לא בא.
translations.vi: Anh ấy có thời gian, nhưng anh ấy không đến.
translations.nl: Hij heeft tijd, maar hij komt niet.
translations.uk: У нього є час, але він не прийде.
translations.hi: उसके पास समय है, लेकिन वह नहीं आ रहा है।
translations.el: Έχει χρόνο, αλλά δεν θα έρθει.
translations.nb: Han har tid, men han kommer ikke.
translations.id: Dia punya waktu, tapi dia tidak datang.
translations.sv: Han har tid, men han kommer inte.
translations.da: Han har tid, men han kommer ikke.
translations.fi: Hänellä on aikaa, mutta hän ei tule.
translations.ja: 彼は時間がありますが、来ません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the first clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; expresses possession.
Common noun, singular; direct object of 'hat'.
Coordinating conjunction introducing a contrasting second clause.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the second clause.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive movement verb.
Negation particle; negates the predicate of the clause.

sentences.target: Ich mag Kaffee, aber ich trinke Tee.
sentences.reading: /ɪç maːk kaˈfeː, ˈaːbɐ ɪç ˈtʁɪŋkə teː/

translations.de: Ich mag Kaffee, aber ich trinke Tee.
translations.ipa: /ɪç maːk kaˈfeː, ˈaːbɐ ɪç ˈtʁɪŋkə teː/
translations.en: I like coffee, but I drink tea.
translations.es: Me gusta el café, pero bebo té.
translations.fr: J’aime le café, mais je bois du thé.
translations.it: Mi piace il caffè, ma bevo tè.
translations.yue: 我鍾意咖啡，但係我飲茶。
translations.ru: Я люблю кофе, но пью чай.
translations.pt: Gosto de café, mas bebo chá.
translations.he: אני אוהב קפה, אבל אני שותה תה.
translations.vi: Tôi thích cà phê, nhưng tôi uống trà.
translations.ar: أنا أحب القهوة، لكنني أشرب الشاي.
translations.nl: Ik hou van koffie, maar ik drink thee.
translations.uk: Я люблю каву, але п’ю чай.
translations.hu: Szeretem a kávét, de teát iszom.
translations.hi: मुझे कॉफी पसंद है, लेकिन मैं चाय पीता हूँ।
translations.el: Μου αρέσει ο καφές, αλλά πίνω τσάι.
translations.nb: Jeg liker kaffe, men jeg drikker te.
translations.id: Saya suka kopi, tapi saya minum teh.
translations.sv: Jag gillar kaffe, men jag dricker te.
translations.ro: Îmi place cafeaua, dar beau ceai.
translations.cs: Mám rád kávu, ale piju čaj.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide kaffe, men jeg drikker te.
translations.ja: コーヒーは好きですが、お茶を飲みます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the first clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; expresses preference.
Common noun, singular; direct object of 'mag'.
Coordinating conjunction introducing a contrasting clause.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the second clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes a direct object.
Common noun, singular; direct object of 'trinke'.

sentences.target: Das ist teuer, aber ich kaufe es.
sentences.reading: /das ɪst ˈtɔɪ̯ɐ, ˈaːbɐ ɪç ˈkaʊ̯fə ɛs/

translations.de: Das ist teuer, aber ich kaufe es.
translations.ipa: /das ɪst ˈtɔɪ̯ɐ, ˈaːbɐ ɪç ˈkaʊ̯fə ɛs/
translations.en: That is expensive, but I’m buying it.
translations.es: Eso es caro, pero lo compro.
translations.zh-Hans: 那个很贵，但我还是要买。
translations.yue: 嗰件好貴，但係我都會買。
translations.ru: Это дорого, но я это куплю.
translations.pt: É caro, mas eu vou comprar.
translations.he: זה יקר, אבל אני קונה את זה.
translations.vi: Cái đó đắt, nhưng tôi vẫn mua.
translations.nl: Dat is duur, maar ik koop het.
translations.uk: Це дорого, але я це куплю.
translations.hi: यह महंगा है, लेकिन मैं इसे खरीदूँगा।
translations.pl: To jest drogie, ale kupię to.
translations.el: Είναι ακριβό, αλλά θα το αγοράσω.
translations.nb: Det er dyrt, men jeg kjøper det.
translations.id: Itu mahal, tapi saya tetap membelinya.
translations.sv: Det är dyrt, men jag köper det.
translations.cs: Je to drahé, ale koupím to.
translations.da: Det er dyrt, men jeg køber det.
translations.fi: Se on kallis, mutta ostan sen.
translations.ja: それは高いですが、買います。
